name: 11q12_SAA_cluster
description: 11q12.2 serum amyloid A (SAA1, SAA2, SAA3P, SAA4) tandem gene cluster. Four highly homologous paralogs in ~150 kb arose by recent duplication; gene conversion between SAA1 and SAA2 generates the SAA1 alpha/beta/gamma allotype polymorphism implicated in AA-amyloidosis risk.

architecture.internal_structure: Four SAA paralogs in ~150 kb at 90-98% identity (SAA1/SAA2 ~96%); gene-conversion hotspots between SAA1 and SAA2; flanking SDs of 5-15 kb.
